text.tspan: Measured directly: d2 does catch SIGINT ("received signal
interrupt: shutting down...") and exits roughly 1-2s later, and
every process here shares the terminal's foreground process
group, so the signal reaches all of them without node forwarding
anything. Before the fix, node itself had no SIGINT/SIGTERM
handler at all - it just died instantly, leaving cleanup entirely
to the OS delivering the same signal to the rest of the group by
